name: rag-assistant-pinecone
description: RAG Assistant with Claude Sonnet and Pinecone for enterprise knowledge management

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../python-services && pip install -r requirements.txt

author: Enterprise RAG Team
